news.headline: Myriad Genetics to share 2024 data at San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium.
news.summary: Myriad Genetics, Inc. has revealed plans to share fresh findings at the upcoming 2024 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium.

news.headline: Oncocyte will participate in J.P. Morgan Week, hosting investor meetings Jan 13-16, 2025 in San Francisco.
news.summary: Oncocyte is set to take part in the "J.P. Morgan Week" and will hold investor meetings from January 13 to January 16, 2025, in San Francisco, California. This event provides a platform for Oncocyte to engage with investors and industry professionals to discuss potential opportunities and advancements in the field. It offers an important networking opportunity for the company as it seeks to showcase its innovations and future plans. This participation aligns with Oncocyte's strategic objectives to enhance visibility and attract potential investors, ultimately contributing to its growth and success.

news.headline: Zions Bancorporation (NASDAQ: ZION) announces 2025 earnings release dates for fiscal quarters, starting Q4 2024.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, on December 9, 2024, Zions Bancorporation, N.A. (NASDAQ: ZION) revealed the anticipated dates for its earnings releases. The company plans to disclose its financial performance for the fiscal fourth quarter of 2024, as well as the first, second, and third quarters of 2025. Investors can expect the financial reports to be shared on specific dates throughout the upcoming quarters.

news.headline: AAR Corp. (NYSE: AIR) will reveal Q2 fiscal year 2025 results on Jan. 7, 2025. CEO highlighted financial performance.

(NYSE: AIR) disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 concluding on November 30, 2024. AAR CORP. is a prominent entity offering aviation services to both commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs. Keep an eye out for the upcoming financial report to gain insights into the company's recent operations and earnings.

news.summary: A renowned consumer robotics company, iRobot Corp. (NASDAQ: IRBT), based in Bedford, Massachusetts, disclosed on December 9, 2024, that it provided an equity award to its recently appointed Senior Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer, Jules. This grant was designated as a significant incentive for securing Jules' employment with the company.

news.headline: Skillsoft (NYSE:SKIL) to release quarterly earnings on 2024-12-10. Analysts expect EPS of $-2.92. Investors eager for positive news.

The upcoming announcement is highly awaited by investors who are hopeful for results exceeding expectations and positive guidance for the following quarter. This news is significant for new investors considering involvement with Skillsoft. For more detailed information, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: HealthEquity reported Q3 revenue of $300.4 million, net income of $5.7 million, and 9.5 million HSAs. Profit margins and EBITDA improved. Repurchased shares worth $60.0 million.Total HSA assets reached $30.0 billion, with 16.5 million total accounts. Expected revenues for fiscal year 2025 are between $1.185 billion to $1.195 billion. 4:30 pm conference call scheduled.
news.summary: HealthEquity, Inc. reported strong financial results for the third quarter ended October 31, 2024. Some key figures from the report include revenue of $300.4 million, a 21% increase from the previous year, and net income of $5.7 million, down from $14.7 million in the same quarter the prior year. Non-GAAP net income was $69.4 million, up 33% from $52.2 million in Q3 FY24. The company had 9.5 million HSAs, a 15% increase from Q3 FY24, and total HSA assets of $30.0 billion, up 33% year over year. HealthEquity repurchased 0.7 million shares of its common stock for $60 million during the quarter. The Company provided an outlook for fiscal year 2025, with expected revenue of $1.185 billion to $1.195 billion and net income between $88 million and $96 million. For fiscal year 2026, they anticipate revenue of approximately $1.275 billion to $1.295 billion. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $118.2 million, up 24% from the previous year. These results were driven by strong HSA growth and record revenue. The company aims to continue expanding its offerings and improving health outcomes for its customers.

news.headline: Vince Holding (NYSE:VNCE) to report an EPS of $0.35 on 2024-12-10. Past performance saw price drops despite beating estimates. Stock trading at $1.71 with 57.5% returns in the last 52 weeks. Analyst consensus is Buy with a $3.0 one-year price target for a 75.44% upside potential. Market sentiment and guidance will impact stock movements post-announcement.
news.summary: Vince Holding (NYSE:VNCE) is set to release its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, 2024-12-10, with analysts anticipating an EPS of $0.35. Investors are eager for news that could exceed estimates and provide positive guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can impact stock prices significantly. In the last quarter, the company surpassed EPS by $0.30, leading to an 11.62% share price drop the following day. Currently, Vince Holding's stock trades at $1.71, showing a 57.5% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts rate Vince Holding as a Buy, with an average one-year price target of $3.0, indicating a potential 75.44% upside. Understanding market sentiments and analyst expectations is crucial for investors.

news.headline: Volkswagen to restart prolonged cost-cutting negotiations with labor representatives next week.
LENSAR grants 2,475 stock options to 4 new employees on Dec 8, 2024 per Nasdaq Listing Rule.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, LENSAR, Inc. (Nasdaq: LNSR) in Orlando, Florida, revealed that a significant portion of LENSAR's board members approved stock options for four newly recruited non-executive staff. These options allow the purchase of a total of 2,475 shares of the Company's common stock. The decision to grant these options was deemed crucial in attracting these employees to join the Company. This action adhered to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Fluence Energy, Inc. plans to offer $300.0 million convertible notes due 2030 in private offering, with potential for additional $45.0 million.
news.summary: Fluence Energy, Inc. based in Arlington, Va., made an announcement regarding its plans to offer $300.0 million aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2030 in a private offering to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A. The company, listed as FLNC on Nasdaq, is a global leader in intelligent energy storage and related services. The offering is exempt from the registration requirements of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, Fluence intends to grant initial purchasers of the Notes an option to buy up to an additional $45.0 million aggregate principal amount of the Notes within 13 days from the issuance date.

news.headline: HealthEquity announces Q3 2024 financial results for period ending October 31.
MyR Group Inc. to attend Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech & Utilities Conference on Jan 7, 2025 in Fla. CEO and CFO to meet investors.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, MYR Group Inc. disclosed its participation in the Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech & Utilities Conference scheduled for January 7, 2025, in Aventura, Fla. MYR Group, a holding company for top specialty contractors in the U.S. and Canada serving electric utility infrastructure, commercial, and industrial construction sectors, will be represented by CEO Rick Swartz and CFO Kelly Huntington. The conference, exclusive to Goldman Sachs clients, will provide an avenue for MYR Group to engage with institutional investors. MYR Group Inc. trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol MYRG.

news.headline: Protara Therapeutics, Inc. plans public offering, offering underwritten shares of common stock or pre-funded warrants, with underwriters granted a 30-day option. Proceeds to fund clinical development of TARA-002 and other programs.
news.summary: Protara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TARA) has begun an underwritten public offering of shares of its common stock or pre-funded warrants to purchase shares. The company plans to offer shares to fund the clinical development of TARA-002 and other programs, with proceeds also targeted for working capital and general corporate purposes. The underwriters may receive a 30-day option to purchase additional shares at the offering price. The completion, size, and terms of the offering are subject to market conditions. No assurance is given about the offering's finalization.

news.headline: TricorBraun acquires Veritiv's Rigid Containers Business, expanding its NA presence.  - St. Louis, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: In St. Louis on December 9, 2024, TricorBraun, a top packaging company, revealed its plans to acquire Veritiv Containers, formerly All American Containers. The agreement signifies TricorBraun's move to expand its reach in the packaging industry. As a prominent distributor nationwide, Veritiv Containers handles a wide range of custom and stock rigid packaging solutions. This acquisition marks a strategic decision for TricorBraun to strengthen its market presence and offer a broader range of packaging options to its customers.

news.headline: Biomea Fusion shares preliminary data from Phase I COVALENT-103 study of BMF-500 in acute leukemia.
news.summary: Biomea Fusion, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in Redwood City, California, shared preliminary findings from the Phase I COVALENT-103 study of their novel covalent small molecule, BMF-500, designed to combat genetically defined cancers and metabolic diseases. The company's investigational covalent FLT3 inhibitor was developed with their exclusive FUSION™ System. This news was announced on December 09, 2024, via a press release distributed through Globe Newswire. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BMEA.

news.headline: DFC commemorates $50B invested in 5 years at 5th anniversary conference, reflecting progress in development and U.S. foreign policy.
news.summary: DFC celebrated its 5th Anniversary Conference in Washington on Dec. 9, 2024, recognizing its establishment by the U.S. Congress in 2019. The event showcased the organization's impressive accomplishments over the years.

news.headline: Chimerix to request accelerated approval of Dordaviprone for patients with recurrent H3 K27M-mutant Diffuse Glioma by year-end.
Veritiv sells its rigid containers business to unnamed buyer, formerly known as All American Containers.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Veritiv Operating Company, a prominent specialty packaging distribution leader, disclosed on December 9, 2024, that it inked a definitive purchase deal to offload Veritiv Containers, its rigid packaging subsidiary (previously known as All American Containers).

news.headline: Fate Therapeutics reports Phase 1 results for FT819 CAR T-cell product in lupus patients, showing promising B-cell depletion.
news.summary: The initial dose cohort comprising three patients underwent treatment with fludarabine-free conditioning. The results showed rapid, deep, and sustained B-cell depletion. Furthermore, the treatment exhibited a favorable safety profile.

news.headline: Vincent Mifsud to become new CEO of Guideline.ai, replacing Scott Knoll.Transition to take place on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: The CEO of Guideline.ai, a prominent advertising data and planning technology provider, Scott Knoll, will be transitioning to the role of Executive Chairman. This change is set to take effect on December 9, 2024. Stepping into the position of Chief Executive Officer will be Vincent Mifsud. The company is undergoing this leadership shift as part of its strategic growth plan.

news.headline: ETH drops to $3.8K amid Bitcoin and altcoin correction. Traders unsure if bearish trend has arrived.
news.summary: The price of Ethereum (ETH) dropped below the $4,000 mark amidst a correction in Bitcoin and other alternative cryptocurrencies. The decline raises questions about whether this is a routine adjustment or if there are other factors influencing the market movements.

news.headline: L2 Capital adds 3 industry leaders to Robbins Sports Surfaces board to advance strategic initiatives in sports and performing arts markets.
news.summary: L2 Capital has recently welcomed three new independent board members to Robbins Sports Surfaces, Inc. Barry Hughson, Thomas Trojian, and John Shiver have joined the Board of Directors, showcasing Robbins' dedication to enhancing its presence in the sports and performing arts sectors. With extensive experience in dance, performing arts, and sports, the trio will contribute valuable insights to drive Robbins' strategic goals forward. Their appointments demonstrate Robbins' commitment to excellence and growth in these markets.

news.headline: Intuit (INTU) and Amazon (AMZN) partner to help millions of Amazon sellers manage finances and grow business seamlessly.
news.summary: In Mountain View, Calif., Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ: INTU) and Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) have revealed a long-term strategic collaboration aiming to support numerous Amazon sellers in handling their finances, ensuring compliance, obtaining capital, and expanding their enterprises. Through the utilization of Intuit’s artificial intelligence-driven expert platform, millions of Amazon sellers can effortlessly explore and utilize Intuit’s platform. This integration will enable them to access valuable financial insights such as profitability, cash flow, and estimated tax details.

news.headline: Google achieves quantum computing breakthrough: unveils machine surpassing tasks beyond traditional supercomputers in 10^24 years.
news.summary: Google recently introduced an experimental machine designed to perform tasks that even a conventional supercomputer would take 10 septillion years to complete. This time frame surpasses the age of the universe itself.

news.headline: Global Cloud VPN market was $9.3B in 2023, expected to reach $33.8B by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 20.2% due to remote work surge.
news.summary: In Dublin, the "Cloud VPN - Global Strategic Business Report" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The worldwide Cloud VPN market was valued at approximately $9.3 billion in 2023 and is anticipated to surge to around $33.8 billion by 2030, showcasing a robust compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20.2% between 2023 and 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market patterns, factors propelling growth, and future projections, enabling strategic decision-making in the business realm. The increasing demand for Cloud VPN (Virtual Private Network) is a key aspect highlighted in the report.

news.headline: Elon Musk criticizes IRS for outdated computers, offers to help improve efficiency as IT consultant.

news.summary: Zscaler's stock has demonstrated strong price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating to 76. This increase highlights the company's improved market performance.

news.headline: Chinese tech firms, including Alibaba, surge in US trading as China promises more stimulus. Trip.com also rises.
news.summary: On Monday, Alibaba stock surged among a group of Chinese tech companies trading in the U.S. following news of China's commitment to provide additional economic stimulus. The boost in Alibaba's stock was particularly notable, accompanied by an upward trend in Trip.com's stock value. This positive shift in the market came as China promised further stimulus measures, signaling potential growth and investment opportunities in the tech sector. The focus on these companies in the U.S. trading market reflects growing investor optimism, with significant gains seen in Alibaba's stock and Trip.com's performance in response to China's latest economic pledges.

news.headline: Oddity Tech stock gets upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating from 76 to 81, showing improving price performance.
news.summary: Oddity Tech has demonstrated improved price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 76 to 81. This upgrade showcases the company's strong momentum in the market.

news.headline: Fastly's stock gets a Relative Strength Rating boost from 76 to 87, showing improved price performance.
news.summary: Fastly's Class A stock has shown improved price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 76 to 87. This increase indicates the stock's growing strength in the market. The upgrade is a positive sign for investors, suggesting that Fastly's stock is outperforming a large majority of other stocks. This development underscores the company's potential for growth and success.

Europe algae biofuel market projected to reach $1.97 billion by 2033 from $1.01 billion in 2023, growing at a CAGR of 6.89% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Value locked in DeFi approaches levels seen earlier this year due to liquid restaking and Bitcoin Layer 2 solutions.
news.summary: There has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country, with a total of 10,000 new cases reported in the past week alone. This brings the total number of confirmed cases to 50,000. The spike in cases has put a strain on the healthcare system, with hospitals reaching full capacity in several regions. Authorities are urging the public to follow safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, vaccination efforts are being ramped up, with a goal of vaccinating 70% of the population by the end of the year.

news.headline: Sonnet BioTherapeutics announces $3.9M offering for 1,085,325 shares & warrants, plus private placement of 673,000 shares & warrants at $2.23.
news.summary: Sonnet BioTherapeutics Holdings, Inc. has announced a definitive agreement with institutional investors for the purchase and sale of 1,085,325 shares of its common stock and warrants to buy up to the same number of shares, in a registered direct offering. The shares are priced at $2.23 each with warrants priced at $2.10 per share, and they will expire in five years. Additionally, a concurrent private placement with an existing investor involves the sale of 673,000 shares of common stock and warrants for the same number of shares at the same prices. This move aims to raise funds for the clinical-stage company developing targeted immunotherapeutic drugs.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market prices fall; U.S. Bitcoin ETF inflows near $10B. Bitcoin -$97,080.94 (-2.8%), Ethereum -$3,798.59 (-4.7%), Dogecoin -$0.4355 (-6.3%). Large transaction volumes down by 2.4%, 216,675 traders liquidated in 24 hours.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are on the decline despite U.S. Bitcoin ETF inflows nearing $10 billion. Current prices show Bitcoin at $97,080.94 (-2.8%), Ethereum at $3,798.59 (-4.7%), Solana at $222.86 (-5.6%), Dogecoin at $0.4355 (-6.3%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00002971 (-7.2%).Statistics reveal that large transaction volume has decreased by 2.4%, with daily active addresses increasing by 8.7%. Transactions over $100,000 saw a decrease from 9,621 to 9,044 in a single day. Exchanges netflows have surged by 156.6%. Coinglass data shows that 216,675 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, amounting to $567.91 million.In other news, El Salvador has eased Bitcoin regulations to finalize a $1.3 billion deal. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

This announcement was made on December 9, 2024, at Potomac Falls, Virginia.

news.headline: American Water (NYSE: AWK) named one of Forbes 2025 Most Trusted Companies in America; largest regulated utility in the U.S.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., American Water (NYSE: AWK), revealed its acknowledgment on Forbes' first-ever roster of the Most Trusted Companies in America 2025. M. Susan Hardwick, the Chief Executive Officer of American Water, expressed gratitude for the recognition, stating, "American Water is honored to be acknowledged once more by Forbes as amongst the most trusted companies in America." This acknowledgment reinforces the company's standing as a reliable entity in the industry.

news.headline: Canada MedLaser expands its Toronto reach with fourth clinic opening in Queen West, offering signature treatments.
news.summary: Canada MedLaser, a reputable provider of cutting-edge skin and body treatments, recently inaugurated its newest facility in Toronto on November 14, 2024. Situated at 8 Gladstone Ave, near Gladstone Hotel in Queen West, this marks the fourth location in Toronto for the esteemed medical aesthetic brand. The clinic aims to provide a wide range of non-surgical treatments tailored to address common aesthetic issues. Specializing in enhancing the appearance of both men and women, the new clinic offers convenient access to innovative solutions for various skin and body concerns.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates ALTR, MPB, CDMO, AVAV. Dec. 9, 2024. Concerns regarding securities laws, fiduciary duties.
news.summary: A legal firm Halper Sadeh LLC based in New York has commenced an investigation on multiple companies for possible breaches of fiduciary duties and federal securities laws. The investigation includes Altair Engineering Inc. (NASDAQ: ALTR). This process seeks to ensure shareholder rights are protected in scenarios related to corporate governance.

news.headline: VivoPower's Caret Digital secures funding for 1,000 Antminer L9s to boost DOGE mining, non-dilutive to shareholders.
news.summary: The asset-backed financing facility has been approved for Caret LLC, also known as Caret Digital. This financing solution will not result in a decrease in ownership for VivoPower shareholders.

news.headline: Nokia buys back own shares on 09.12.2024.
